name: Bobby Colomby
description: American drummer, record producer and television presenter
abstract: Robert Wayne Colomby (born December 20, 1944) is a jazz-fusion drummer, record producer and television presenter. He is best known as an original member of the group Blood, Sweat & Tears, which he co-founded in 1967.

concerts.label: An Evening with Blood, Sweat and Tears

works.t: You've Made Me So Very Happy

about_quotes.speaker: Roger Kellaway
about_quotes.evidence: Bobby Colomby of Blood Sweat and Tears is the producer and I’m the arranger.
about_quotes.doc_title: Roger Kellaway interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 14, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Carmen Caramanica
about_quotes.evidence: he got him together with Bobby Colomby, the producer for Blood, Sweat and Tears, and so that’s how the first Jaco album actually came to be.
about_quotes.doc_title: Carmen Caramanica interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, July 27, 2011

about_quotes.speaker: Lew Soloff
about_quotes.evidence: Bobby Colomby produced that tune, and he would punch in here and punch in there, and that solo was very, very constructed by Bobby.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lew Soloff interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 16, 2000

about_quotes.speaker: Stanley Kay
about_quotes.evidence: But I knew Bobby Colomby, the drummer. And I said I’ll call Bobby myself, I’ll beg him.
about_quotes.doc_title: Stanley Kay interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 18, 2001
